chapter_title: Obedience to and Effect of Traffic Laws
text: The provisions of this division refer exclusively to the operation of vehicles upon the highways, unless a different place is specifically referred to.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 1. Obedience to and Effect of Traffic Laws [21000 - 21300]
#### Article 1. Definitions [21000 - 21001]
##### § 21001

The provisions of this division refer exclusively to the operation of vehicles upon the highways, unless a different place is specifically referred to.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: The provisions of this division refer exclusively to the operation of vehicles upon the highways, unless a different place is specifically referred to.
